title: OpTimatic LITE
description: OpTimatic Lite is a performance-first edition of OpTimatic, reducing extra features to focus on smoother gameplay, higher FPS, and better stability.
body:
# OpTimatic Lite

OpTimatic Lite is the streamlined, performance-first edition of [Optimatic](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optimatic).
Built for players who want smoother gameplay, better FPS, and improved stability — without the extra quality-of-life features found in the full version.

With over 40+ non-essential mods removed, Lite focuses purely on optimization and core improvements, keeping the experience clean, responsive, and efficient.

Like the main pack, OpTimatic Lite aims to stay updated to the latest Minecraft versions whenever possible, so you can enjoy improved performance without falling behind.

Basic **controller** support is included by default for players who prefer it.
